inputs.label: Pressure (atm)
inputs.businessContext: The pressure value in standard atmospheres to be converted.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from atm to bar. Adjustable for calibration or traceability.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the primary output.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Reference temperature for potential gas law corrections (informational; not used in standard conversion).

inputs.label: Altitude
inputs.businessContext: Altitude above sea level for atmospheric pressure estimation (informational; not directly used in atm to bar conversion).

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty
inputs.businessContext: Relative uncertainty percentage for TÜV-compliant documentation and error bounds.

breakdown: Math.round(pressure_atm * conversion_factor * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
